gates.name: required_sections
gates.description: Voice guide must contain all required sections

gates.name: has_examples
gates.description: Guide must contain at least one example comment with a placeholder variable
gates.error_message: No example comments with {variable} placeholders found

gates.name: no_dev_slang
gates.description: Voice guide must not contain common dev slang that breaks character
gates.error_message: Dev slang detected: "{match}" — voice guides must stay in character

gates.name: bot_self_reference
gates.description: Output must never acknowledge being a bot or AI

params.pattern: (?i)(as an ai|i am a bot|i'm automated|i am automated|as a language model|i'm an ai|i am an ai)
